meta_title: For Students: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Bridge the experience gap. Learn to design with AI, leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build a high-impact portfolio that lands your first dev role.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends when you stop coding static templates and start shipping AI-driven applications. By integrating Antigravity for rapid design iteration and Claude Code for autonomous logic implementation, you can transform abstract concepts into production-ready SaaS projects, proving your technical competence to hiring managers in days, not months.
content.intro:
The job market doesn't care about your GPA; it cares about what you've shipped. You are staring at a blank repository, paralyzed by the fear that your academic projects won't hold weight against seasoned professionals. The gap between your current skill set and a professional-grade portfolio feels like a chasm that no amount of theory can bridge.

But the rules of the game have shifted. With AI-assisted development, you are no longer just a coder; you are a force multiplier. By leveraging advanced tooling like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can bypass the tedious boilerplate and focus on building high-impact, real-world solutions that demonstrate actual engineering maturity.

steps.title: Define the Architecture
steps.description: Establish a clear scope for a SaaS utility that solves a genuine pain point, ensuring your tech stack is modern and scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level technical architecture document for a SaaS application that tracks freelance project milestones. Define the database schema, API endpoints, and necessary frontend state management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a Next.js project with Tailwind CSS and Supabase integration based on the provided architecture document.'

steps.title: Rapid UI Prototyping
steps.description: Generate high-fidelity UI components that look like they were built by a senior design team, focusing on user experience and accessibility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the React code for a responsive dashboard sidebar and a data-driven table component using Lucide icons and Shadcn/UI patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the generated components into the existing project structure and ensure they follow mobile-first design principles.'

steps.title: Logic Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle complex backend logic, ensuring clean separation of concerns and robust error handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side function to handle authenticated API requests for project status updates, including input validation and error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add the server-side function to the project, set up API routes, and implement middleware for authentication checks.'

steps.title: Database Integration
steps.description: Connect your application to a live database to ensure your portfolio project functions as a real-world application rather than a static demo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a migration script for Supabase to create the projects and users tables with appropriate RLS policies for data security.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute the migration script and create the corresponding TypeScript interfaces for the database schema.'

steps.title: Deployment and Polish
steps.description: Prepare your code for production, including environment variables, performance optimization, and final documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a README.md file that explains the project's purpose, the tech stack used, and how to deploy the application to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Review the codebase for performance bottlenecks and prepare a deployment-ready configuration for Vercel.'

pro_tips: Always use 'chain-of-thought' prompting when working with Claude Code to force the model to plan its logic before writing code.
Treat your Git commit history as a resume; use descriptive, professional commit messages that show the evolution of your features.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a hard technical challenge, rather than building five generic CRUD apps.
Integrate automated testing early using Claude Code; showing a project with 80%+ test coverage immediately separates you from junior applicants.
Host your project on a custom domain; it adds a layer of professional polish that free hosting URLs lack.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, deploy it to a public domain, write a blog post detailing the 'why' behind your technical decisions, and share it on LinkedIn to start building your professional brand.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap to turn your portfolio from a blank slate into a career-defining asset. Don't wait for permission to start building. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
